title: Forgotten Stone
description: Adds a Forgotten Stone and Ancient Forgotten Stone from Block Story to minecraft
body:
Adds a forgotten stone and an ancient forgotten stone from Block Story to the game. In addition, Stairs, Slab, and Wall are in mod. You can craft a forgotten stone using 4 cobblestones and 4 stones, for ancient forgotten stone 4 forgotten stones

Block Story made by Mindblocks
